violations.claim: VIOLATION: Loop Accumulator Overflow at check
violations.smt2:
; PRINCIPLE: loop-accumulator-overflow
; LINE: 60
; VIOLATION: Loop Accumulator Overflow at check
(declare-const iterations Int)
(declare-const per_iteration Int)
(declare-const accumulator_60 Int)
(assert (> iterations 0))
(assert (> per_iteration 0))
(assert (= accumulator_60 (* iterations per_iteration)))
(assert (> accumulator_60 9007199254740991))
(check-sat)
